name: Southern Hills Macaroons
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 350 degrees. Line baking sheets with parchment paper.
Combine almond paste, sugars, cornmeal, and honey in a large bowl and blend until smooth. Gradually add egg whites, mixing well. Spoon the mixture into a pastry bag fitted with a number 8 plain round tip. Pipe the mixture onto prepared baking sheets in rounds about 1-1/4 inches in diameter, spacing them 1-1/2 inches apart. Flatten slightly with a dampened cloth. Bake until light golden, about 20 to 25 minutes. Slide macaroons (still on parchment) onto racks. Let cool completely, then carefully peel off parchment paper. Store macaroons in an airtight container. If baking sheets will be reused, let cool between batches to avoid scorching the bottoms of the macaroons.
